title: Telegram rich media support — send images, videos, PDFs, voice messages, and receive/analyze voice messages
what_failed: telegram_send only supports text. No ability to send image files, video clips, PDFs, PPTs, audio/voice messages, or any binary attachments. Also no ability to receive and transcribe/analyze incoming voice messages from Ash via Telegram.
suggested_fix:
Expand Telegram integration using Bot API endpoints:
1. sendPhoto — send image files (JPG/PNG) generated by image_gen or analyze_media
2. sendVideo — send .mp4 clips from generate_video
3. sendDocument — send PDFs, PPTs, DOCX, any file
4. sendAudio / sendVoice — send audio files or TTS output
5. sendAnimation — send GIFs
6. Webhook/polling receiver — receive incoming messages from Ash on Telegram, detect voice messages (file_id), download via getFile, pipe through Whisper STT (transcribe_file), then respond
7. Auto-trigger: after image_gen, generate_video, read_document — offer/auto-send result to Telegram if Ash is on mobile
All under a unified telegram_send(file=path, type='photo'|'video'|'document'|'voice') signature extension.
